_comment: Golden dictation-gate decision matrix, shared by TWO implementations so contract drift turns CI red: the Rust evaluators in src-tauri/src/scribe.rs (test gate_matches_golden_fixtures_cross_impl) and the shell gate in announce.sh (driven by announce_gate.test.sh via `announce.sh --gate`). Each case is a Scribe snapshot minus updatedAt; the harness stamps updatedAt = now - offsetMs (a negative offset => a FUTURE timestamp). `hold` is the contract: should the gate HOLD voice (defer) rather than speak. All fixtures carry app==scribe and omit schemaVersion so the v1 evaluator's app/version guards are satisfied and it agrees with the file evaluator on every row.
